mapper.select: SELECT p.payment_idx, p.order_idx, go.room_idx, go.leader_member_idx AS member_idx, p.payment_mode, p.payment_status, p.payment_request_amount AS amount, CONCAT('Mo-Eats 대표결제 #', p.payment_idx) AS order_name, p.payment_expires_at FROM payment p JOIN group_order go ON go.order_idx = p.order_idx WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND p.payment_mode = 'REPRESENTATIVE' AND p.payment_status IN ('READY', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT p.payment_idx, ps.payment_share_idx, p.order_idx, go.room_idx, ps.member_idx, p.payment_mode, p.payment_status, ps.share_status, ps.share_amount AS amount, CONCAT('Mo-Eats 각자결제 #', ps.payment_share_idx) AS order_name, p.payment_expires_at FROM payment_share ps JOIN payment p ON p.payment_idx = ps.payment_idx JOIN group_order go ON go.order_idx = p.order_idx WHERE ps.payment_share_idx = #{paymentShareIdx} AND p.payment_mode = 'INDIVIDUAL' AND p.payment_status IN ('READY', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(attempt_no), 0) + 1 FROM payment_transaction WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND transaction_type = 'REPRESENTATIVE'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(attempt_no), 0) + 1 FROM payment_transaction WHERE payment_share_idx = #{paymentShareIdx} AND transaction_type = 'INDIVIDUAL'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_transaction ( payment_idx, payment_share_idx, member_idx, attempt_no, provider, transaction_type, merchant_order_id, currency, request_amount, cancelled_amount, transaction_status, idempotency_key ) VALUES ( #{paymentIdx}, #{paymentShareIdx}, #{memberIdx}, #{attemptNo}, #{provider}, #{transactionType}, #{merchantOrderId}, #{currency}, #{requestAmount}, #{cancelledAmount}, #{transactionStatus}, #{idempotencyKey} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_transaction WHERE merchant_order_id = #{merchantOrderId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_transaction SET transaction_status = 'IN_PROGRESS', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_transaction_idx = #{paymentTransactionIdx} AND transaction_status IN ('READY', 'FAILED')

UPDATE payment_transaction SET provider_payment_key = #{providerPaymentKey}, provider_method = #{providerMethod}, approved_amount = #{approvedAmount}, transaction_status = 'DONE', approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, raw_response = #{rawResponse}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_transaction_idx = #{paymentTransactionIdx}

UPDATE payment_transaction SET transaction_status = 'FAILED', fail_code = #{failCode}, fail_message = #{failMessage}, raw_response = #{rawResponse}, failed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_transaction_idx = #{paymentTransactionIdx}

UPDATE payment_transaction SET transaction_status = CASE WHEN transaction_status = 'DONE' THEN transaction_status WHEN transaction_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN transaction_status ELSE 'EXPIRED' END, expired_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment_transaction SET transaction_status = 'CANCEL_PENDING', fail_message = #{failMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_transaction_idx = #{paymentTransactionIdx}

UPDATE payment_transaction SET transaction_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_amount = #{cancelledAmount}, cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, raw_response = #{rawResponse}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_transaction_idx = #{paymentTransactionIdx}
UPDATE payment_share SET share_status = 'PAID_BY_REPRESENTATIVE', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment_share SET share_status = 'PAID_SELF', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_share_idx = #{paymentShareIdx}
UPDATE payment_share SET share_status = 'CANCELLED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND share_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment_share WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND share_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(share_amount), 0) FROM payment_share WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND share_status IN ('PAID_SELF', 'PAID_BY_REPRESENTATIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE room_participant rp JOIN group_order go ON go.room_idx = rp.room_idx JOIN payment p ON p.order_idx = go.order_idx SET rp.payment_status = 'PAID', rp.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}

UPDATE room_participant rp JOIN payment_share ps ON ps.member_idx = rp.member_idx JOIN payment p ON p.payment_idx = ps.payment_idx JOIN group_order go ON go.order_idx = p.order_idx AND go.room_idx = rp.room_idx SET rp.payment_status = 'PAID', rp.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ps.payment_share_idx = #{paymentShareIdx}

UPDATE payment SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_at = CASE WHEN #{paymentStatus} = 'PAID' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE paid_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
UPDATE payment SET payment_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}

UPDATE group_order go JOIN payment p ON p.order_idx = go.order_idx SET go.order_status = 'PAID', go.payment_confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, go.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}

UPDATE group_order go JOIN payment p ON p.order_idx = go.order_idx SET go.order_status = 'CANCELLED', go.cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, go.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}

UPDATE order_room orr JOIN group_order go ON go.room_idx = orr.room_idx JOIN payment p ON p.order_idx = go.order_idx SET orr.room_status = 'ORDER_CONFIRMED', orr.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}

UPDATE order_room orr JOIN group_order go ON go.room_idx = orr.room_idx JOIN payment p ON p.order_idx = go.order_idx SET orr.room_status = 'EXPIRED', orr.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE p.payment_idx = #{paymentIdx}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.payment_idx FROM payment p WHERE p.payment_mode = 'INDIVIDUAL' AND p.payment_status IN ('READY', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND p.payment_expires_at IS NOT NULL
AND p.payment_expires_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_share ps WHERE ps.payment_idx = p.payment_idx AND ps.share_status = 'PENDING' )
SELECT * FROM payment_transaction WHERE payment_idx = #{paymentIdx} AND transaction_status = 'DONE' AND provider_payment_key IS NOT NULL
